'''Triton Squad Leader''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who led [[Triton Squad]] into the depths of the [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] jungles to chase fugitive [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] following the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], most notable of whom was [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. He and all of his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] were ambushed and killed in the conflict.<ref name="Descent" />
